entries.title: jstack
entries.description: jstack — a layered learn→plan→execute loop over 9 phases. Step 0 plans the task into a dependency-ordered checklist + a # LAYERS list; each layer walks all nine phases then advances to the next (frontend→…→deploy), only the last firing the ship promise. A semantic node-cache keys each node by a normalized token-set signature of its goal, so when a goal matches one settled on a prior walk the loop surfaces the prior result for reuse (skip) and fans out independent nodes in parallel. Mandatory podman containment: ship gates and witnesses run inside a memory-capped envelope (no host fallback). Contract-native: /contract substrate (aiko), default ship_gate, post-ship seal. In-place, multi-session, per-step grader, fib-harness adversarial pass on the verdict phase. Three harness adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode.

entries.title: acp-find
entries.description: The trust + intelligence layer for the Virtuals Protocol ACP marketplace — search, evaluate, and orchestrate on-chain agents, and know which are REAL. v0.18.1 excludes mutual-boost / wash-trade farm buyers from the trust verdict's organic-demand count, so a boost farm buying your offering on a loop can no longer mint VERIFIED. v0.18.0 tiers the tools: a lean 20-tool CORE (search + trust) is the default for the remote endpoint and bare npx, while the full 47-tool surface is opt-in via ACP_FIND_TIER=full (this plugin runs FULL). v0.17.0 adds a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (add it by URL, no install) and makes the trust verdict authoritative across the plugin, the website report, and an embeddable by-address badge. v0.16.4 weights acp_agent_trust by DISTINCT organic buyers (N completions from one buyer no longer reads like N from many; the headline + delivery lane disclose organicDistinctBuyers and the score dampens single-buyer concentration). v0.16.3 documents the marketplace-gap↔categories reconciliation fields (totalAllMarketplaces/denominatorNote/countScope). v0.16.2 hardens acp_agent_trust so VERIFIED requires a genuine third-party buyer (excludes the operator's own portfolio wallets, so self-dogfooding can't earn VERIFIED). v0.16.0 adds acp_agent_trust (a one-call VERIFIED/OPERATIONAL/UNVERIFIED/SUSPECT/LIKELY_CLONE verdict fusing clone-screening, SecurityBot grade, and official-indexer completed-jobs-by-distinct-counterparties — the anti-self-loop signal), de-blinds acp_agent_verify onto the official Virtuals indexer, and adds opt-in inline trust on acp_find/acp_search_agents. Plus semantic V1+V2 search, REAL V2 transactions (acp_v2_transactions/acp_agent_jobs/acp_v2_demand), Degen Arena overlap, risk scoring (0-100, A-F), SecurityBot scanning, marketplace gap analysis, and one-call composites — backed by the public api.acp-metabot.dev gateway. entries.description: + CFP-2549 (2026-07-02) — background-wait liveness gate (ADR-139) 실배선: 모든 codeforge-owned background subagent 대기(run_in_background/bg spawn)의 wall-clock 상한+liveness 관측 없는 무한 대기 결함(#763 Iter4/5)을 CFP-2545 codex-companion 의 Ports&Adapters 일반화로 근절. playbook 공통 단락 INV-L1~L4(max-wait ceiling/fail-open 금지 inconclusive/0-byte≠stall 3-state/Orchestrator 소유) + general-adapter presence lint(liveness_check_base.py base + check_subagent_wait_liveness_presence.py + byte-identical workflow, warning tier) + execution-backed self-test(124/127) + parallel-dispatch-protocol v1.1(worker_outcomes +INCONCLUSIVE) + sibling ADR-081 Amd13/ADR-039 Amd10 §결정 20. 신규 required check 0. 6.61.0 → 6.63.0 MINOR. |+ CFP-2544 (2026-07-02) — Orchestrator inline-write gate 신설 (Wave1 warning-tier): ADR-039 Amendment 9 §결정 9 deferred slot("Orchestrator inline write detect hook") 실현 + ADR-115 Amendment 1 §결정 6 scope-boundary 이관. PreToolUse(Write|Edit|MultiEdit) 물리 가드로 최상위 세션(Orchestrator)의 repo/worktree 직접 편집을 caller-scoped 검출 — 실측 83세션 127건 드리프트(worktree 95 + 직접 32) 폐지. discriminator = PreToolUse payload `agent_id` 필드 (non-empty=subagent=allow / 부재·null·""=Orchestrator=block-candidate, F2 fail-safe). path ordering invariant = worktree(~/.claude/worktrees/) 체크가 memory(~/.claude/) carve-out 보다 먼저(load-bearing subset — 뒤집으면 95건 무력화). Wave1 = warning-tier(stderr block 마커 + exit 0, NEVER exit 2, ADR-115 §결정 5 fail-open). 신규 파일 — hooks/pretooluse-inline-write-gate (extensionless polyglot, pretooluse-agent-spawn-gate warning skeleton 미러) + scripts/check-inline-write-gate.sh (ADR-061 thin wrapper, SSOT 부재 fail-open) + scripts/lib/check_inline_write_gate.py (verifier SSOT, _read_payload/_check_bypass/_classify_agent/_classify_path 4-func, check_repo_confinement.py _norm realpath 재사용) + hooks/tests/test_pretooluse_inline_write_gate.py (pytest 14-case discriminating fixture + §8.7 design-confirm 3종: MultiEdit live schema / distinct sentinel 2종 / relative-path cwd-resolve). hooks.json PreToolUse += Write|Edit|MultiEdit matcher. evidence-checks-registry += runtime-hook-pretooluse-inline-write-presence (5번째 family member, warning-tier, declarative anchor — presence-lint 기계배선은 family 전체 declarative-only 이므로 follow-up 분리). BYPASS_INLINE_WRITE_GATE env(audit trail, block 마커와 distinct sentinel). Wave2 deny 승격 = ADR-060 evidence-gate (PR≥20 + bypass 외 failure=0 + sibling merged) 후 별 CFP. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-039 Amd9 + ADR-115 Amd1 paired amendment) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.61.0 → 6.62.0 MINOR (신규 runtime hook = 기능추가, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2545 (2026-07-02) — Codex companion 브로커 경로 wall-clock 가드 배선 (ADR-081 Amendment 12 §결정 D14, dogfood wrapper-self Phase 2): 실 리뷰 worker 호출부 CodexReviewAgent.md:89 `node codex-companion.mjs adversarial-review --wait`(4 리뷰 lane 공유) companion `request()` deadline 부재 → stall 시 node·Bash·worker·Orchestrator 무한 대기(~2h silent hang carrier)를 `timeout ${CODEX_REVIEW_TIMEOUT_SEC:-300} --kill-after=${CODEX_REVIEW_KILL_AFTER_SEC:-30}` wall-clock ceiling 으로 근절. N=추정값 empirical 미실증(env-override, lock-in 금지) + lane override(_SECURITY/_DESIGN) + consumer hardcap 900s. exit 124(timeout kill) → fail-mode enum #8 재사용 marker `[codex-sandbox-fallback: dispatch_stall_or_stream_timeout]` + verdict=inconclusive (fail-open 금지 — PASS-only-if-explicit, exit 0+verdict부재=inconclusive, 부분 stall ANY→전체 inconclusive). AC-1 mechanical 강제 = presence-grep lint (scripts/lib/check_codex_companion_timeout_presence.py Python SSOT ADR-061 + thin wrapper + templates/+.github byte-identical workflow ADR-005): dispatch 발화 timeout <N> prefix(리터럴 or ${VAR:-int} env-default) + --kill-after 동반 + N 양수 + hollow-gate 차단 I-3(파일 존재 시 발화 ≥1, 발화 0건→exit1) + 경로부재 fail-open(consumer no-op). self-test 8-case RED→GREEN discriminating + mutation proof(가드 제거 시 PASS→RED firsthand 실증). evidence-checks-registry codex-companion-timeout-presence entry(warning tier) + label-registry-v2 hotfix-bypass:codex-companion-timeout-presence(2.102→2.103, 103번째 family). playbook §3.10 companion sub-paragraph(wall-clock ceiling + Orchestrator liveness 게이트 보조 2차 + timeout N < liveness max-wait 순서) + review-pl-base.md cross-ref. 신규 required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.60.3 → 6.61.0 MINOR (신규 companion wall-clock 거버넌스 behavior + 신규 wrapper script/workflow = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2530 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml job-level if: hashFiles(...) context-availability 위반 born-invalid gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정13 Amendment 2): hashFiles 는 step-level 전용이라 job-level if 는 workflow load-time schema-invalid → D1 게이트가 css-lint.yml 신설(PR #2511) 이래 0회 로드/실행. job-level if 삭제 → step-level 가드 + in-job fast-exit(경로C genuine pass) 단일 채널. 재발 봉인 = 신규 actionlint-workflows-test.yml(wrapper-self, job-level hashFiles 재삽입 mutation → actionlint exit!=0 hard-fail) + templates/ coverage. 양 copy byte-identical parity. PATCH 6.60.3. + CFP-2527 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml --config-basedir 누락 hollow-gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정12 Amendment 1): 격리 toolchain($RUNNER_TEMP/css-lint-toolchain/node_modules) 에 STYLELINT_BASEDIR GITHUB_ENV export + floor self-check(--print-config) 와 실 lint run 양쪽에 --config-basedir 부착 → consumer verbatim 채택 시 stylelint extends:stylelint-config-standard resolution 실패(ConfigurationError, rule 평가 이전 사망)로 게이트가 단 한 줄도 lint 못하던 reached-but-dead hollow-gate 복구. 양 copy(.github + templates) byte-identical parity. test-css-lint.sh C5 consumer-형상 discriminating fixture 신설. PATCH 6.60.2. + CFP-2523 (2026-06-30) — schema-lib archive/adr existence-guard dead-path 활성 + 10 ADR backfill (atomic Phase 2, CFP-2519 후속): check_doc_frontmatter.py REQUIRED + check_doc_section_schema.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS 에 "archive/adr" 키 확장-only 추가 — wrapper ADR(archive/adr/) 가 docs/adr-only 키로 silent skip 되던 existence-guard dead-path 활성. naive 활성 시 FAIL 할 10 ADR (frontmatter 1 = ADR-042-mc closing delimiter / section 9 = 116/117/118/122/127/128/129/132/133)을 3-way TYPE(안전 rename / 신규 섹션 from related_files / 상태 from frontmatter)으로 동일 PR HEAD tree 에 atomic backfill — 관련 ADR 류 섹션(127/128/129 ## 관련 + 133 ## 관련 ADR)은 보존 + 별도 ## 관련 파일 신설(의미오염 차단). 141 ADR 전수 PASS(fm/sec exit=0) 실측. consumer 무해(existence-guard). PATCH 6.59.3. + CFP-2519 (2026-06-30) — docs/adr→archive/adr dead-path 클래스 sweep (functional 3 + stale-ref 2, CFP-2515 후속, Phase 2): CFP-2515 가 adr-sunset-criteria.yml 단일 dead-gate 만 정정하며 남긴 동형 dead-path 클래스(wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하는 docs/adr-only path 패턴)의 잔여 sweep. wrapper 는 ADR 을 archive/adr/ 에 두고 consumer 는 docs/adr/ 를 써, docs/adr-only path 는 consumer 정상·wrapper-self 비대칭 dead-gate. CFP-2515/CFP-2491 확립 path-agnostic 해법((docs|archive)/adr alternation / 2-entry glob)을 적용. (A functional 3) decision-principle-vocabulary.yml on.paths archive/adr 2-entry glob + detect grep `^((docs|archive)/adr/ADR-.*\.md|...)` alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_decision_principle_vocabulary.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 1줄 추가(in_scope() 가 SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 → collect+in_scope 동시 정정, 단일-site). kst-timestamp-display.yml 동형 on.paths + grep alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_kst_timestamp.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 추가 + ★in_scope L113 standalone path.match 2-call(SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 아닌 하드코딩 → 2-site 필수, decision 과 비동형). phase-gate-mergeable.yml SECURITY_PATHS regex `/^(docs|archive)\/adr\/ADR-.*\.md$/` alternation(required check check-gate, fail-closed 보안강화 — wrapper archive/adr 보안 ADR 의 post-merge-fix fast-pass 우회 차단, cond3 진입가드 hasPostMergeFixLabel 한정이라 정규 lane 영향 0) + L199 주석. entries.title: bench-cowork
entries.description: BenchAGI agent fleet + skills for Claude Code. Tier D of the harness ladder. 0.5.0: adds bench-forge MCP (forge_submit_diagnostics, forge_ticket_status) so tenant harnesses can file diagnostics as Forge tickets that sync to GitHub issues server-side — no GitHub account needed; new generic servers/bench-http-bridge.js stdio MCP server drives registered HTTP manifests (bench-wiki, bench-canvas, bench-slack, bench-chassis, bench-forge), re-reads ~/.claude/config/bench-cowork.json per call, and auto-refreshes expired cowork tokens via POST /cowork/auth/refresh; new forge-report skill + /forge-report command. bench-excalidraw.json remains draft/unregistered until /excalidraw/* routes land. 0.4.2: fix — agent model pins (piper/cole/bailey/ember) updated from claude-sonnet-4-6-20250819 → claude-sonnet-4-6 alias to recover from inaccessible snapshot. No tool shape changes. 0.4.1: exposes the triage-mail skill in the Claude Code plugin manifest. 0.4.0: adds bench-mail stdio MCP for multi-account Gmail triage (list_accounts, search_threads, get_thread, create_draft, list_labels, create_label, apply_label) — every tool takes an explicit account_email. Customers connect Gmail via apps/web Settings → Integrations → Gmail (Bench Mail). Tokens encrypted at rest with ENCRYPTION_KEY; v1 does NOT request gmail.send. Cycle 6: 7 agents + 8 skills + 4 MCP servers + /bench-login auth + Amendment-10 pre-commit hook. 0.3.5: doc fix — /wiki-capture command frontmatter now references `wiki_draft` (member-auth, single-entry) instead of `wiki_ingest` (cowork-auth, bulk); the SKILL.md and MCP manifest already pointed at wiki_draft since 0.3.1, the command description was the last stale reference. No tool shape changes; wiki_search and wiki_canon_read unchanged. 0.3.4: /bench-login skill now resolves the caller's tenant ID via GET /api/me/identity and caches it as bench_instance_id in the local config; web sidebar avatar links to /app/account. 0.3.3: bench-wiki.wiki_ingest now points at the cowork-authed POST /cowork/wiki/ingest route and hard-shards writes to users/{uid}/wikiEntries/{slug} so Tier D users can bulk-sync a local vault without needing a super-admin key. Entries land as drafts; admin review promotes to platform canon. The prior 0.3.2 super-admin /wiki/ingest route is untouched — it still exists for the OpenClaw daemon. 0.3.2: wiki_draft no longer accepts `instanceId` in the payload — the server derives tenant from auth.instanceId and rejects payload-side claims with 400 (tenant binding). Canon reads (/wiki/canon, /wiki/list, /wiki/[slug]) are now tenant-scoped for members. 0.3.1: adds bench-wiki.wiki_draft tool (member-auth POST /wiki/draft) for conversation-born canon captures. 0.3.0: BREAKING — bench-wiki.wiki_ingest request shape changed from flat object to wrapped { entries: [...] } array; `body` renamed to `markdown`. Server auto-fills localHash/localMtime when omitted. New /wiki/search endpoint + restored wiki_search tool pointing at it. Callers built against 0.2.0 must update.

Philosophy: Correct once, never again; recall everything next time.
